name: withdraw account invalid amount policy
description: This project's input-validation and error-reporting policy for account operations.
steps: Validate arguments at the top of every public method before mutating any state.
To reject an operation, raise PolicyError(code) imported from the errors module (from errors import PolicyError). Never raise ValueError or a bare Exception and never return None to signal refusal.

Use these exact catalog codes (this project's arbitrary error IDs - copy them verbatim, they are not derivable from anything else): a zero or negative amount is 'ACCT-4417'; a withdrawal that exceeds the current balance is 'ACCT-4420'.
PolicyError.code must equal the catalog string exactly, character for character.
